meta.title: Predictive signal in ball-by-ball cricket beyond match state
meta.task: T1 per-ball outcome distribution, K=11 alphabet, t20 cell
meta.evidence_status: FINAL — Branch C frozen at C1 (validation only); see conditions.status

splits.policy: 80/10/10 temporal by match start_date, baked into corpus v1.2

state_ladder_t1_t20_test.note: post-calibration test NLL [95% match-level paired-bootstrap CI]; the state ladder from the M2 leaderboard

identity_t1_t20_test.verdict_bands: JUSTIFIES >=1.0%; AMBIGUOUS [0.3%,1.0%); KILL <0.3% or CI includes 0

conditions_t1_t20.status: PARTIAL — Branch C frozen at C1 (VALIDATION ONLY; C2 canary and C3 single test touch NOT executed by decision; no downstream change expected)
conditions_t1_t20.signal: B3-residual scoring valence; causal per-match latent (theta_hat uses only prior balls in the same match)
conditions_t1_t20.scope_caveat: scoring-rate valence latent only; a null does not rule out non-scoring conditions structure (e.g. wicket-prone-but-not-low-scoring pitches)

val.carryover_note: full-match vs per-innings latents differ by ~0.0001 nats on val -> cross-innings carry-over (pitch-persistence / team-leakage confound) is not materially active

shuffled_identity.detail: shuffled 1.61533 vs state 1.61438, delta +0.00095 within eps 0.01

shuffled_target.detail: retrained-on-shuffled-labels sits at B0 within eps 0.01

poison_column.detail: structural whitelist select-first; poisoned outcome column unreachable

temporal_split.detail: no match in two splits; max(train)<min(val)<...<min(test)

match_shuffle.detail: Branch C frozen at C1 by decision

conclusion.headline: State-saturation: match-state model B3 captures essentially all recoverable per-ball predictive signal in free ball-by-ball data.
conclusion.identity: Player identity adds +0.31% NLL (0.007 bits/ball) on test — real but AMBIGUOUS at the band floor.
conclusion.conditions: A causally-filtered per-match scoring-conditions latent adds +0.024% NLL on validation (0.0006 bits/ball) — an order of magnitude below identity; frozen at C1 as negligible.
